description_long: This object is a small bird with a vibrant yellow underside and a dark, almost black, head and upper back. The wings are a mix of brown, black, and yellow, with some white markings visible on the feathers. The beak is short, straight, and pointed, typical of many insectivorous or omnivorous birds. The tail is relatively short and appears slightly rounded with a subtle gradation in feather length. The legs and feet are tucked beneath the body and are not prominently visible, but hints of a pale or grayish color can be seen. The plumage is smooth and well-defined, with a clear contrast between the bright yellow belly and the darker upper parts.
description: A small bird with a bright yellow belly, dark head and back, and brown-black wings with white markings. The beak is short and pointed, and the tail is slightly rounded.
description_view_0: Side view showing the yellow belly, dark head, and brown-black wings with white markings.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the tail feathers and the gradient from yellow to brown on the back.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with the yellow underside, dark head, and more visible eye and beak profile.
description_view_3: Front view focusing on the dark head, short beak, and the symmetry of the yellow underparts.
attribute_plumage_pattern: solid yellow underparts, black head and neck, brown-black wings with white wing bars, and olive upperparts
